---
description: "Plan a new feature implementation for OE Manager GUI"
agent: "planner"
argument-hint: "Describe the feature to plan"
---

Plan the implementation of a new feature for OE Manager GUI.

1. Analyze the current codebase to understand existing patterns
2. Identify which files need to be modified or created
3. Determine which PASOE API endpoints are needed
4. Create a step-by-step implementation plan
5. List edge cases and testing scenarios

Reference the project structure:
- [app.js](../../js/app.js) - Main application class
- [agentService.js](../../js/agentService.js) - API wrapper
- [templates.js](../../js/templates.js) - HTML templates
- [style.css](../../css/style.css) - Styling
